2023June 11, 2023

🇫🇷 Paris, France

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Saint-Denis, France, June 11, 2023 -- June 17, 2023

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2023-06-paris-france

19 Resolutions

1125Plenary
Establish a liaison relationship to ISO/TC 268
SC 4 requests its Committee Manager establish a liaison to ISO/TC 268.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1124Plenary
Skip CD ballot and proceed to DIS ballot for ISO 14306-1
SC 4 resolves to skip the CD ballot (stage 30.0) and move directly to a DIS ballot (Stage 40.0).
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1123Plenary
Start a PWI for an amendment of ISO 13584-501
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 supports the start of preliminary work item for publishing an amendment on ISO 13584-501 with an aim to replace the maintenance procedure described in the standard based on RA with ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1122Plenary
Change ISO/TS 23301 ed2 to SDT 24 and adjust target date
SC 4 requests its Committee Manager to set the SDT at 24 and adjust the target date for Stage 60.60 (International Standard published) to 2024-03-01.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1121Plenary
Ballot ISO/TR on Core terminology for industrial data
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 requests its Committee Manager to ballot AG 3/N2 "Automation systems and integration - Core terminology for industrial data" as a DTR.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1120Plenary
Launch ISO/NP Ontology-based interoperability and create WG 26
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 requests its Committee Manager launch ISO/NP Automation systems and integration -- Ontology-based interoperability with an eight-week ballot duration.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1119Plenary
Change ISO/DIS 29002 target dates and assign to SDT 36
SC 4 resolves to assign ISO 29002 (Industrial automation systems and integration -- Exchange of characteristic data) to the SDT 36 development track, with the target dates: circulation of the enqui...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1118Plenary
Establish liaisons to ISO/TC 164/SC 1 and ISO/TC 213
SC 4 requests its Committee Manager establish a liaison to ISO/TC 164/SC 1.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1117Plenary
Extend the mandate of TF 2 on ISO/TR 17999
SC 4 concurs with the recommendation of ISO/TC 184/SC 4/TF 2 to extend the mandate of TF 2 and add to its terms of reference the following: * Build upon the ISO/TR 17999 SC 4 Reference Architecture...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1116Plenary
Create a Task Force for the SC 4 Common Change Process
SC 4 requests its Committee Manager establish a Task Force on the SC 4 Common Change Process with the following terms of reference: * Create a Committee Specific Procedure for WG 21, WG 22, WG 23, ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1115Plenary
Appoint Deputy Convenor for WG 3
SC 4 appoints the following Deputy Convenor for a three-year term, with appreciation to serve in this capacity: |=== |WG |Role |Appointment |WG 3 |Deputy Convenor |Nils Sandsmark |===
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1114Plenary
Establish 8-week ballot duration for new work item proposals
SC 4 requests its Committee Manager to apply the 8-week ballot duration to the following NP ballots: |=== |Project |Approval |ISO/NP 23247-5 |☒ |ISO/NP 23247-6 |☒ |ISO/PWI 14306-2 |☒ |===
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"

Acclamation

ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its sincere appreciation to all the experts, delegates, and leaders for executing our hybrid plenary meeting successfully while undergoing numerous challenges.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
